revision.comment: new key for [[Category:18th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]

This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 18th century. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 18]] [[Category:18th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:18th-century Buddhism|Temp]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=18th-century_Buddhist_temples here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
